text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle is important for both your body and mind. A balanced diet includes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins, while limiting processed foods and sugar. Regular exercise, such as walking, jogging, or cycling, helps strengthen your heart and muscles. It also boosts your mood and energy levels. Sleep is another essential part of health. Aim for seven to nine hours each night to allow your body to recover. Finally, don't forget about your mental health. Try to manage stress by taking breaks and balancing work with relaxation and hobbies. A good work-life balance helps you feel happier and more productive every day.
